name: UX Designer Profile
description: Design-focused professional passionate about user research and product experience

profile.interests: user experience, product design, psychology, accessibility, typography
profile.values: user empathy, collaboration, continuous improvement, learning
profile.workingStyle: collaborative with structured ideation sessions, user-centered research
profile.hardSkills: Figma, prototyping, user research, design systems, HTML/CSS basics
profile.softSkills: communication, stakeholder management, creative problem-solving, presentation
profile.geographicPreference: flexible — hybrid or office in tech hubs
profile.education: Bachelor's in Design or related field
profile.purposePriorities: creating delightful user experiences, advocating for users, building design systems
profile.burnoutConcerns: ignoring user feedback, design-by-committee, unrealistic project timelines
